topic: Config layout for a small CLI tool
objective: Decide whether a small CLI tool should keep all configuration in one file or split it across per-command files.
parentContext: A single-binary CLI with ~6 subcommands is adding user configuration. The team is split between one config file and per-command files. The decision is needed before the config loader is written.
knownFacts: expected to grow to ~12 within a year
successCriteria: A clear recommendation naming the main trade-off
The strongest objection to the chosen option
